sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41847" key="e)porqrismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπορθρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n41847.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rising early,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τελωνικῶν κεκραγμῶν -ισμοί</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">morning cries</tr_> of noisy tax-gatherers, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.654f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
